description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is set on a paved lot with multiple parking spaces and is surrounded by several mature trees, providing a touch of greenery. The main entrance is located on the side facing the driveway, featuring a simple door without elaborate ornamentation. The structure appears to be a single-story building with an open-plan interior visible through the windows. The overall design emphasizes functionality and simplicity, characteristic of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a paved lot with parking and trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and partial side of the house, highlighting the flat roof, white walls, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior, with trees and parked cars visible on the left.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the opposite side, showcasing three large windows, a row of trees along the facade, and two cars parked near the entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house with the main entryway, four parked cars, and a clear view of the paved lot and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the window arrangement, two parked cars, and the proximity of the driveway to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door facing the driveway, no porch or steps, minimalistic and unadorned
